message:
Integrate FrankenGlitch and NeuralPulse across all components

This commit wires the new FrankenGlitch and NeuralPulse effects into
every interactive component, creating a cohesive "alive laboratory
equipment" aesthetic across the entire site.

Cards and data displays:
  - feature-card: Wrapped in FrankenContainer with withPulse, added
    anatomy mode internals (hex watermark + SVG wireframe), glitch
    on icon hover
  - comparison-table: FrankenGlitch on header "FrankenTUI" and each
    feature row name, green glow on positive checkmarks, withPulse
  - optimization-card: FrankenGlitch on title, withPulse, uppercase
    tracking on metric labels
  - war-story-card: FrankenGlitch on title, withPulse
  - algorithm-card: Added missing FrankenGlitch import
  - stats-grid: NeuralPulse on each stat cell hover, FrankenGlitch
    on labels, larger numbers (text-5xl), tabular-nums, stronger
    green glow on hover
  - screenshot-gallery: withPulse on image containers

Code and media:
  - rust-code-block: NeuralPulse on hover, FrankenGlitch on title,
    bolder token styling (keywords font-black, types font-bold,
    comments italic), darker background
  - video-player: NeuralPulse, FrankenGlitch on title, CRT scanline
    overlay, larger play button, aspect-video container

Navigation and chrome:
  - site-header: FrankenGlitch on logo, NeuralPulse on scrolled
    header bar, Magnetic wrapper on GitHub CTA, animated breathing
    status dot, green border on active nav indicator
  - site-footer: FrankenGlitch on brand mark (now a Link), animated
    status pulse with green glow, hover translate-x on nav links,
    animated back-to-top arrow, Magnetic on social icons
  - client-shell: New stitched transition overlay — 12 vertical
    green lines that scale in/out with stagger during page
    transitions, evoking surgical sutures being pulled tight
  - site-terminal: Error state tracking (isError field), FrankenGlitch
    on error output and header title, NeuralPulse background,
    FrankenBolt decorations, cn utility for conditional classes

Interactive elements:
  - custom-cursor: New DataDebris particle system — hex/binary
    characters float upward from cursor position, proximity-based
    glow ring that intensifies near interactive elements
  - franken-eye: Blink animation on random interval, proximity
    detection (pupil dilates when cursor approaches), hover state
    with intensified green glow, lid squeeze on close approach

Shared patterns:
  - section-shell: FrankenGlitch wraps all section headings with
    hover trigger, data-magnetic on icon containers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
